ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nests" (
  "nest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nest */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the nest */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species associated with the nest */,
  "nest_type" TEXT /* Type of nest (e.g., tree cavity, ground nest) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the nest was installed or first discovered */,
  "installation_method" TEXT /* Method used to install the nest (e.g., artificial nesting box, natural nesting site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nests_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nests_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "nest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nest being surveyed */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor conducting the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the survey (e.g., ACTIVE NEST, INACTIVE NEST) */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather conditions during the survey */,
  "nest_status" TEXT /* Status of the nest during the survey (e.g., active, inactive, unknown) */,
  "eggs_count" INTEGER /* Number of eggs found in the nest during the survey */,
  "chicks_count" INTEGER /* Number of chicks found in the nest during the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("surveyor_id") REFERENCES surveyors ("surveyor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_nest_id FOREIGN KEY ("nest_id") REFERENCES nests ("nest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveyors" (
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveyor */,
  "surveyor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the surveyor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the surveyor */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the surveyor belongs to */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Relevant certifications held by the surveyor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surveyor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., Endangered, Least Concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's characteristics */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_efforts" (
  "effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation effort */,
  "nest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nest related to the effort */,
  "effort_type" TEXT /* Type of conservation effort (e.g., Habitat Restoration) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the effort */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the effort was undertaken */,
  "effort_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the conservation effort */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the conservation effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_efforts_nest_id FOREIGN KEY ("nest_id") REFERENCES nests ("nest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with this weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature (in Celsius) during the survey */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation (in mm) during the survey */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the survey */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Surveyor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the surveyor, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("surveyor_id") REFERENCES surveyors ("surveyor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
